src/main/java/com/askie01/recipeapplicat.general_idea: Enable Spring Data JPA auditing to automatically populate audit fields like creation and modification timestamps.
src/main/java/com/askie01/recipeapplicat.human_impl: Added @EnableJpaAuditing annotation to the main application class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure GitHub Packages as the deployment repository for artifacts.
Remove the Spring Boot DevTools dependency.
Remove the Spring Boot Docker Compose dependency.
Add the Spring Boot H2 Console starter for database inspection.
Add JavaFaker dependency for generating fake data in tests.
Remove Testcontainers dependencies for JUnit Jupiter and MySQL.
Remove the Docker image name configuration from the Spring Boot Maven plugin.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Add MySQL datasource connection details to the application configuration.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/recipe_database
    username: root
    password: root

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Configure JPA Hibernate to disable automatic DDL generation.
Specify the MySQL dialect for Spring Data JDBC.
Define the auditor type for the component configuration.
Configure specific validator types for various domain fields like image, name, and servings.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
component:
  validator:
    image-type: five-mega-bytes-image
    name-type: non-blank-string
    servings-type: positive-servings

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Configure specific mapper types for IDs, images, and DTO-to-entity conversions.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
component:
  mapper:
    id-type: simple-long-id
    image-type: validated-image
    recipeDTO-to-recipe-type: simple
